authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently and explicitly sided with D3 (traffic camera metadata) over D1 (police report) throughout the entire conversation. It clearly identified the police report as the least reliable source (3/10) despite its official authority, citing that it was based on a second-hand, self-serving account contradicted by objective sensor data. The model gave D3 a 9.5/10 reliability score and used specific evidence (reversing velocity detected, impact with Vehicle B) to justify overriding the authority source. No deference to the police report's authority was observed.
